name: The DIRECTV Group, Inc.
description: The DIRECTV Group, Inc. is a leading provider of digital television entertainment services in the United States and Latin America. Through its subsidiaries, the company transmits digital satellite television, audio, and multi-channel video programming to residential and commercial subscribers. DIRECTV offers a wide array of sports, news, movies, and general entertainment programming, utilizing advanced satellite technology to deliver high-definition broadcasts and interactive services to millions of customers.
